message:
refactor(demo-showcase): adjust theme color palette for consistency

Minor refinements to the theme system color definitions:
- Adjust color values for improved visual harmony across screens
- Ensure consistent appearance when using the expanded theme features

These changes complement the earlier theme expansion work and
address feedback from visual testing of the demo screens.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
